# MAZA Overclock

A 24-hour engineering competition for teams that build systems under pressure.

Every repository in this organization represents a submission from a past Overclock competition. They are preserved to celebrate engineering craftsmanship, document architectural decisions, and inspire future competitors.

---

## About

MAZA Overclock challenges teams to design, build, and ship a working system in 24 hours. Submissions are judged on problem understanding, technical execution, completeness, craftsmanship, and collaboration.

## Explore Submissions

Browse repositories to see how past teams approached real problems — from architecture and tradeoffs to demo guides and team collaboration models.

## Compete

Interested in competing? Visit the competition page for rules, schedules, and registration details.
